titleStmt.title: Glory of the Kings, Documents on the History of ʾAksum and beyond

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Kǝbra nagaśt
msItem.note: The titles of the 118 chapters are included in the text.

msItem.title: Kǝbra nagaśt, ፩ ፡ በእንተ፡ ክብረ፡ ነገሥት፡
msItem.incipit: ፍካሬ፡ ወዜና፡ ዘ፫፻፲ወ፰፡ ርቱዓነ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ በእንተ፡ ክብር፡ ወዕበይ፡ ወተድላ፡ ዘከመ፡ ወሀበ፡ እግዚኣብሔር፡ ለደቂቀ፡ አዳም፡ ወፈድፋደሰ፡ ዘበእንተ፡ ዕበያ፡ ወክብራ፡ ለጽዮን፡ ታቦተ፡ ሕጉ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ እንተ፡ ኬንያሃ፡ ወገባሪሃ፡ ለሊሁ፡ በውስተ፡ ጽርሐ፡ መቅደሱ፡ እምቅድመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ፍጥረት፡ ዘመላእክት፡ ወሰብእ፡

msItem.title: በእንተ፡ ዘለአከ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ሰሎሞን፡ መልአከ፡ ኃይሉ፡
ኀበ፡ መከረ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ይፈኑ፡ ወልዶ፡ ምስለ፡ ደቂቆሙ፡
ኀበ፡ ተፈነዉ፡ ምስለ፡ አቡሁ፡ ወለሀወት፡ ሀገር፡
ኀበ፡ ዘይቤሎ፡ ለሳዶቅ፡ ካህን፡ ሑር፡ ወአምጽእ፡ እምውስተ፡ ልብሰ፡ ዘላዕሌሃ፡
በእንተ፡ ቀዳሚ፡ ፍትሑ፡ ለአድራሚ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ሮም፡
በእንተ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ ዘከመ፡ ገብአ፡ ሀገሮ፡
ወወሀበት፡ ንግሥተ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ ማክዳ፡ መንግሥታ፡ ለወልደ፡ ዳዊት፡
በእንተ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ሮሜ፡ ወንጉሠ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡
msItem.colophon: ዛቲሰ፡ ንግሥተ፡ አዜብ፡ እምድኅረ፡ ተመይጠት፡ እምሰሎሞን፡ ንጉሥ፡ ፳ወ፭፡ ዓመተ፡ ኀበ፡ ሀገረ፡ አክሱም። ወኵሉ፡ መዋዕለ፡ መንግሥታ፡ ድሙር፡ ፸ወ፭፡ ዓመት፡ ነገሥት፡ በሰላም፡

መጽሐፍ፡ አውፃእናሃ፡ እመጽሐፈ፡ ቅብጢ፡ ለዓረቢ፡ እመቃብረ፡ ማርቆስ፡ ወንጌላዊ፡ መምህር፡ አበ፡ ኵልነ፡ ወአውፃእናሃ፡ በ፬፻ ወ፱ ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት፡ ውስተ፡ ሀገረ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ገብረ፡ መስቀል፡ ንጉሥ፡ ኄር። ወበመዋዕለ፡ አባ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ኄር፡ ጳጳስ፡ ወአስተታ፡ አውፅአ፡ ወተርጒማ፡ ኀበ፡ ሀገረ፡ አብሻ ። ወሶበ፡ ሐለይኩ፡ ዘንተ፡ እቤ፡ ለምንት፡ ኢተርጐምዋ፡ አባልዕዝ፡ ወአባልፈረግ፡ እለ፡ አውፅእዋ። እቤ፡ ዘንተ፡ እስመ፡ ወፅአት፡ በመዋዕለ፡ ዛጔ፡ ወኢተርጐምዋ፡ እስመ፡ ትብል፡ ዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ እለሰ፡ ይነግሡ፡ እለ፡ ኢኮኑ፡ እስራኤል፡ ተዓድዎ፡ ሕግ፡ ውእቱ። ወሶበሰ፡ ይከውን፡ መንግሥተ፡ እስራኤል፡ እምአውፅእዋ፡ ወእምተረክበት፡ በናዝሬት። ወባሕቱ፡ ወጸልዩ፡ ላዕሌየ፡ ለገብርክሙ፡ ይስሐቅ፡ ነዳይ፡ ወኢትሒሱኒ፡ በእንተ፡ ኢያርትዖ፡ ልሳን፡ እስመ፡ ብዙኃ፡ ፃመውኩ፡ በእንተ፡ ክብራ፡ ለሀገረ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ በእንተ፡ ፀአታ፡ ለጽዮን፡ ሰማያዊት፡ ወበእንተ፡ ክብረ፡ ለነግሥተ፡ ኢትዮጵያ፡ እስመ፡ አነ፡ ተሰአልክዎ፡ ለመኰንን፡ ርቱዓ፡ ሃይማኖት፡ ፍቁረ፡ እግዚኣብሔር፡ ያዕብይከ፡ እግዚእ። አፍቀረኒ፡ ወይቤለኒ፡ ግበር፡ ወገበርኩ፡ እንዘ፡ እግዚኣብሔር፡ ይረድአኒ፡ ወኢፈድየኒ፡ በከመ፡ አበሳየ፡ ለገብርክሙ። ዮምኔ፡ ጸልዩ፡ ላዕሌየ፡ ወእለ፡ ፃመዉ፡ ምስሌየ፡ በአውፅኦ፡ ዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ እስመ፡ ተመንደብነ፡ ፈድፋደ። ስብሐት፡ ለገባሬ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይትረአይ፡ ወዘኢትረአይ፡ ይእዜኒ፡ ወዘልፈኒ፡ ወለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜ፨

msItem.title: Documents on the History of ʾAksum and beyond
Kama-zǝ nubāre śǝrʿātā la-ʾǝmmǝna Ṣǝyon gabaza ʾAksum
msItem.incipit: ከመዝ፡ ገባሬ፡ ሥርዓተ፡ ለእምነ፡ ጽዮን፡ ገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡ እስከ፡ ፲ወ፭ በእመት። ኢረከቡ፡ መሠረታ፡ ወጸፍጸፋ፡ ከዲህ፡ ፯በእመት፡ እምድር፡ እስከ፡ አፈ፡ ጽዮን። ወከርሠ፡ ንድቁ፡ ፯በእመት፡ ወኑኁ፡ እምራብ፡ እስከ፡ ምሥራቅ፡ ፻ወ፳ወ፭ በእመት። ወምደቡብ፡ እስከ፡ ሰሜን፡
msItem.explicit: በ፴ወ፱ዓመት፡ ምሕረት፡ ኮነ፡ ሱራሬሃ፡ ወተፍጻሜታሂ፡ በ፺ወ፩ ዓመት፡ ምሕረት፡ ዓለምሰ፡ ሕልም፡ ወጽላሎት፡ ውእቱ። ወአልቦ፡ ዘይዌሰክ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ዘይነትግ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.note: In his catalogue, Conti Rossini indicates the beginning on f. 81r instead of f.81v.

msItem.title: Śǝrʿāta qʷǝrḥat
msItem.incipit: ዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ዘወሀቦ፡ ሰሎሞን፡ ንጉሥ፡ ዕብነ፡ ሐኪም፡ ወልዱ፡ ወወሀቦ፡ ሰብአ፡ ሕግ፡ እለ፡ የሐውሩ፡ ምስሌሁ፡ ሀገረ፡ ኢትዮጵያ።
msItem.explicit: ወሐደሰ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ወሪዶ፡ ሀገረ፡ አክሱም፡ ርእሰ፡ አህጉር፡ ወትምክህተ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ወትርሲቶሙ፡ ለነገሥት።

msItem.title: Śǝrʿāta beta mangǝśt
msItem.incipit: ሠርዓተ፡ ቤተ፡ መንግሥተ፡ ፄዋ፡ ሠርጐ፡ አርክ፡ ደቀ፡ ሠርጓ፡ ፀዋሬ፡ ድባብ፡
msItem.explicit: እሉ፡ ዘወፅኡ፡ ምስለ፡ ዕብነ፡ ሐኪም፡ ንጉሥ።

msItem.title: ʿĀmatāta nagaśtāta ʾAksum
msItem.incipit: ዓመተ፡ ነገሥታተ፡ አክሱም፡ዘዓረዌ፡ ፱፻ ዓመት፡ ዘግዱር፡ ዘኑኁ፡
msItem.explicit: ፳ወ፰ዓመት፡ ዘቤተ፡ እስራኤል፡ ዘገብረ፡ መስቀል፡ ፲ወ፬ ዓመት።

msItem.title: King list A
msItem.incipit: ወዝውእቱ፡ ዓመታተ፡ ነገሥት፡ ነገሥተ፡ አክሱም፡ እምአርዌ፡ እስከ፡ ናልኳ፡ ፲ወ፩ ነገሥት፡ ወዓመታቲሆሙ፡ ፱፻፸ወ፪።
msItem.explicit: ፈጸመ፡ ሕገ፡ ወሐደሰ፡ መንበረ፡ መንግሥቶሙ፡ ለነገሥተ፡ ጽዮን፡ እምኵሎን፡ አህጉር፡ ትምክህተ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዓለም፡ ወትርሲቶሙ፡ ለነገሥት። ።

msItem.title: King list B
msItem.incipit: ልደተ፡ አበው፡ እምአዳም፡ እስከ፡ ይእዜ፡ አዳም፡ ወለደ፡ ለሴት፡
msItem.explicit: ከሰኔ፡ መድኃኔ፡ ዓለም፡ እስከ፡ መስከረም፡ ጠፍ። አፄ፡ ሣህሉ፡ ነገሠ፡

msItem.title: Gʷǝlt land donation by Abraha and Aṣbǝḥa to ʾAksum Ṣǝyon

incipit.hi: በአኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ንሕነ፡ እለ፡ አብርሃ፡ ወአጽብሃ፡ ነገሥተ፡ አክሱም፡ ጐለትነ፡ ጕልተ፡ ለገበዘ፡ አክሱም። ሐውስታ፡ በዘፈራ፡ ሐበራ፡ በዘፈራ፡

msItem.explicit: እመቦ፡ ዘሄደ፡ ወዘተዓገለ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ለይኩም፡ በአፈ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ወጳውሎስ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Donation of gʷǝlt lands to the church of Aksum and renewal of earlier gʷǝlt grants by Anbäsa Wǝdǝm
msItem.incipit: አኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አነ፡ አንበሳ፡ ውድም፡ ሐደስኩ፡ ጕልተ፡ ለገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡ ዘወሀቡ፡ አበውየ፡ ቀደምት። ወካዕበ፡ አነ፡ ጐለትኩ፡ ለገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡ ደብረ፡ ሰላም፡ በዘፈራ፡ ታዕካ፡
msItem.explicit: እምቦ፡ ዘሔደ፡ ወዘተዓገለ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ለይኩን፡ በሥልጣነ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ወጳውሎስ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Donation of gʷǝlt lands by Walatta Māryām
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ጐለትኩ፡ አነ፡ ወለተ፡ ማርያም፡ ፍንቅሊት፡ በዘፈራ፡ ለትዝካረ፡ እግዚእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወለተዝካርየ፡
msItem.explicit: እምቦ፡ ዘሔደ፡ ወዘተዓገለ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ለይኩን፡ በሥልጣነ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ወጳውሎስ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Donation of gʷǝlt lands by Sayfa ʾArʿad
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ጐለትኩ፡ አነ፡ ሰይፈ፡ አርእድ፡ ጕልተ፡ ለገዘ፡ አክሱም፡ ከመ፡ ይኩን፡ ለተዝካረ፡ እግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ኰኵሕ፡ ቀጠጤ፡ እክል፡ ደረቃ፡ አኮ፡ በቃለ፡ ሐፄ፡
msItem.explicit: እመቦ፡ ዘሄደ፡ ወዘተአገለ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ይኩን፡ በሥልጣነ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ወጳውሎስ። እመሂ፡ ንቡረ፡ እድ፡ ወአፈ፡ ንቡረ፡ እድ፡ ዘእንበለ፡ ማኅበር። ።።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Three land donations of gʷǝlt lands by Zarʾa Yāʿqob renewing and increasing the previous land grants
Donation of gʷǝlt lands by Zarʾa Yāʿqob
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ጐለትኩ፡ አነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ መደቤ፡ ወአደ፡ አቅይት፡
msItem.explicit: ከመ፡ ይኩነኒ፡ ለተዝካርየ፡ ወለማዕጠንት፡ ወኢይቅርባ፡ መኑሂ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ለይኩን።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Restoration of gʷǝlt lands by Zarʾa Yāʿqob
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ሐደስኩ፡ አነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ጕልተ፡ ለገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡ ደብረ፡ ሰላም፡
msItem.explicit: ዘተአደወ፡ ዘንተ፡ ውጉዘ፡ ለይኩን።።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Donation of gʷǝlt lands by Zarʾa Yāʿqob
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ጐለትኩ፡ አነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ወልደ፡ ዳዊት፡ ጕልተ፡ ለእምነ፡ ጽዮን፡ ገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡ ምድረ፡ ናዴር፡ በዘፈራ፡
msItem.explicit: ከመ፡ ትኩነ፡ ለመባእ፡ ወለተዝካረ፡ እግዚእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ እመቦ፡ ዘተዓደወ፡ ይጉዘ፡ ለይኩን፡ በአፈ፡ ጴጥሮስ፡ ወጳውሎስ። ።።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Commemoration of the reign of Fāsiladas and ʾƎsāto
msItem.incipit: በአኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ንጽሕፍ፡ ዝክረ፡ ሠናይቲሆሙ፡ ብዙኅ፡ ወተውህናሆሙ፡ ፈድፈደ፡ ለነገሥትነ፡ ወልደ፡ ዳዊት፡ ወልደ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ወልደ፡ ይስሐቅ፡ ወልደ፡ አብርሃም፡
msItem.explicit: ወጥቀ፡ ወደስዎሙ፡ ወባረኩ፡ ላዕለ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ወንግሥት፡ ላዕለ፡ ወለቶሙ፡ ቡርክት፡ ማርያም፡ ይንሕጽ፡ ቤተ፡ ነፍሳቲሆሙ፡ በሰማያት፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Rule for the protection of ʾAksum Ṣǝyon by Zarʾa Yāʿqob
msItem.incipit: ወካዕበ፡ ሠራዕኩ፡ ወአዘዝኩ፡ አነ፡ ዘርአ፡ ያዕቆብ፡ ወልደ፡ ዳዊት፡ ከመ፡ ኢይባእ፡ ኀበ፡ እምነ፡ ጽዮን፡ ገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡ አንበሳ፡ ወፈረሰ፡ ወበቅል፡ ወአውፋሬ፡ ዘረፍታ።
msItem.explicit: ወከመ፡ ሲሞን፡ መሠርየ፡ ሠማርየ፡ አሜን።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Taxes from the land of the house of the king
msItem.incipit: ግብረ፡ ሀገር፡ ዘቤተ፡ ንጉሥ፡ እምሐውስታ፡ ሸሕ፡ ታቡሽ፡ ፭እንተ፡ ላም፡ መባእ፡ ካቦ፡ ቅብዕ፡ ቤተ፡ ቂሮስ፡ ፭እንተላም፡
msItem.explicit: ዘንብረ፡ እድ፡ ወያወፅእ፡ ግብረ፡ በከመ፡ ፈቀደ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: List of the compulsory labours during the construction of ʾAksum Ṣǝyon
msItem.incipit: ወከመዝ፡ ጥንተ፡ ግብሮሙ፡ አህጉር፡ እለ፡ ይሠርሑ፡ ገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡ ግብሮሙ፡ ለደብተራ፡ ማዕጠንት፡ ቍልዝ፡ ዘይጸፈጽ።
msItem.explicit: ወዘይኤዝዝ፡ ለአርባዕቲሆሙ፡ ፩አድ፡ አቃጽን፡ ማይ፡ ባራ፡ ምድረ፡ መባአ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: History of the foundation of ʾAksum
msItem.incipit: ከመዝአ፡ ጥንተ፡ ሱራሬሃ፡ ለእምነ፡ ጽዮን፡ ገበዘ፡ አክሱም። ቀዲሙ፡ ተሣረረት፡ በመዝብር፡ ኀበ፡ ሀሎ፡ መቃብሪሁ፡ ለቄዎጱስ፡ ወልደ፡ ኩሳ፡ ወልደ፡ ካም።
msItem.explicit: ወካዕበ፡ ሀሎ፡ ጸላሎተ፡ ሥዕለ፡ መስቀሉ፡ ለአባ፡ ሰላማ፡ ከሣቴ፡ ብርሃን፡ በበዓተ፡ ባርያ፡ ሶበ፡ አዕረፈ፡ ወነበረ፡ ኀበ፡ ይእቲ፡ ዕብን፡ ሥዕለ፡ ጽላሎተ፡ መስቀሉ፡ ክቡር።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Restoration of the rule concerning church of Aksum by Śarḍa Dǝngǝl
msItem.incipit: በአኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ቅዱስ፡ ወበረድኤታ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ሐደስነ፡ ወሠራዕነ፡ ንሕነ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ሠርፀ፡ ድንግል፡ ወስመ፡ መንግሥትነ፡ መልአክ፡ ሰገድ፡ ወልደ፡ ንጉሥ፡ አድማሰ፡ ሰገድ፡ እምብዙኅ፡ ወፍድፉድ፡ ትሩፋተ፡ ሕግ፡ ወሠርዑ፡ አበዊነ፡ ቀዳማውያን፡ ለእምነ፡ ጽዮን፡ ገበዘ፡ አክሱም፡
msItem.explicit: ወትርሲቶሙ፡ ለነገሥትነ፡ ከመ፡ ትኩነነ፡ መርሃ፡ መነብግሥተ፡ ሰማያት፡ ወከመ፡ ትባርክ፡ ፍሬ፡ ከርሥነ፡ ዘይነብር፡ ዲበ፡ መንበረ፡ ዳዊት።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Chronology of Umayyad and Abbasid califs, of the Fatimids and Ayyubites until 659 H.
msItem.incipit: ጥያዌ፡ ጥንተ፡ ዕለት፡ ዘመነ፡ መንግሥቶሙ፡ ለተንብላት፡ በዕለተ፡
msItem.explicit:
፯፻፶፱ዓመት፡ ተንባላት።
በ፷፻ወ፯፻፶ወ፪እምዓመተ፡ ዓለም።

msItem.title: Zə-wəʾətu zenā səmomu la-ʾabawina liqāna ṗāṗāsāt za-ʾƎllaskəndəryā
msItem.incipit: ዝውእቱ፡ ዜና፡ ሰሞሙ፡ ለአበዊነ።ሊቃነ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘእለ፡ እስክንድርያ።
msItem.explicit: ፺፮ አባ፡ ዮሐንስ። ፺፯ አባ፡ ገብርኤል፡ ዘሀሎ፡ ይእዜ።

msItem.title: Short note on Zāgʷe Kings
msItem.incipit: ወእምድኅረ፡ አፍለሰት፡ መንግሥተ፡ እስራኤል፡ ትርዳእ፡ ገበዝ፡ ብእሲተ፡ መራራ፡ ኀበ፡ እለ፡ ዛጔ
msItem.explicit: ወዓመታቲሆሙ፡ ፻፴ወ፫፡ ወኍልቈሙ፡ ፲ወ፯ ወእምኔሆሙ፡ ፬ዐቢያን።

msItem.title: List of objects from ʾAksum Ṣǝyon given by King Lǝbna Dǝngǝl to the governors of the north
msItem.incipit: እንዘ፡ ሀሎ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ልብነ፡ ድንግል፡ በምድረ፡ ዞብል፡ ዘወሀቦ፡ ምዕቅብና፡ ለሠየምት፡ አቅሐ፡ ዘአክሱም፡
msItem.explicit: ወኮነ፡ ድሙር፡ ፶፻ወ፭፻ ዓመት። ። ።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: Restoration of the lands by ʾIyāsu I
msItem.incipit: በአኰቴተ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ወበረድኤታ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ጽዮን፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ። ሐደሱ፡ ወሠርዑ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ኢያሱ። እንዘ፡ ቢትወደድ፡ አንስጣስዮስ።
msItem.explicit: ወትባርክ፡ ፍሬ፡ ከርሦሙ፡ ወታንኅ፡ መዋዕሊሆሙ፡ እስከ፡ ኅልፈተ፡ ምድር፡ ወሰማያት፡ አሜን።

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Textus
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

bibl.title: Documenta ad illustrandam historiam<hi rend="italics">, I:</hi> Liber Axumae, Versio
Corpus Scriptorum Christianorum Orientalium
bibl.publisher: E Typographeo Reipublicae–Carolus Poussielgue Bibliopola; Otto Harrassowitz

msItem.title: List of Kings who will reign at the end of the world, according to St Clement
msItem.incipit: እመጽሐፈ፡ ቀሌምንጦስ፡ ጋይን፡ ዘይቤ፡ ጋብዮስ። ቃፍ፡ ዘይቤ፡ ጋላውዴዎስ። ኖን፡ ዘይቤ፡
msItem.explicit: ኖን፡ ዘይቤ፡ ኑስጥንትያኖስ። ሜም፡ ዘይቤ፡ ሙረቅ።

msItem.title: ሥርዓተ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ንጉሥ፡
msItem.incipit: ሥርዓተ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ዘይቀድሙ፡ ድሙ፡ ለምክር፡ ወቅድመ፡ ኵሉ፡ ዘይመክር፡ የሻለቃ፡ ዘይል፡ ጭፍራ፡ ወበላዕሌሁ፡ ይመክር፡ የሽአለቃ፡ ዘተሠርዓ፡ ጭፍራ፡ በሀገር፡ በበመዓርጊሁ፡ ወበበጾታሁ።
msItem.explicit: ወበላዕሌሆሙ፡ ይመክር፡ ንጉሥ፡ ኍሉቀ፡ ወምቱረ፡ ነገረ። ።

msItem.title: ሥርዓት፡ ወሕግ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ንጉሥ፡ አመ፡ ሞተ፡ ንጉሥ፡
msItem.incipit: ሥርዓት፡ ወሕግ፡ ዘቤተ፡ ንጉሥ፡ አመ፡ ሞተ፡ ንጉሥ፡ ያንብሩ፡ አስከሬነ፡ ኀበ፡ ዐቢይ፡ ቤቱ።
msItem.explicit: ዘወሰኩ፡ ለፍትሕ፡ በመንግሥተ፡ ዓምደ፡ ጽዮን። ቀዳሚሰ፡ ነበሩ፡ እንዘ፡ ይነዝኁ፡ ማየ፡ ጸሎት፡ ጽራጅ፡ ማሰሬ፡ ዘያነብር፡ አክሊለ፡ ዲበ፡ ርእሰ፡ ንጉሥ። ለዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ አጽሐፍኖ፡ ቀደምት፡ በእንተ፡ ፍቅረ፡ ዚአሃ፡ ለጽዮን፡ ሰማያዊት፡ ዘሀለወት፡ አክሱም፡

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in the upper right corner of the folia.

collation.signatures: Undecorated quire marks are written in the main hand, in the middle of the upper margins of , , , , , , , , , , , starting with ፩ for . The manuscript is composed of quinions and quaternions.

supportDesc.condition: Antoine d’Abbadie [d’Arrast] describes the state of the manuscript as following: 'The last 43 leaves have been damaged by rats and humidity; the text has suffered slightly in the last 12 leaves for the same reason.' (Les 43 derniers feuillets sont entamés par les rats et par l’humidité ; le texte a un peu souffert dans les 12 derniers feuillets pour la même cause.)

origin.origDate: As stated by Antoine d’Abbadie [d’Arrast], it was copied for Arnauld [Michel] d’Abbadie [d’Arrast] in Gondar from a manuscript which belonged to the son of Takla Giyorgis I.

Extrait du Journal Asiatique
bibl.publisher: Imprimerie nationale

Journal Asiatique
Aux frontières de la codicologie et de la diplomatique. Structure et transmission des recueils documentaires éthiopiens
Gazette du livre médiéval
Le Liber Aksumae selon le manuscrit Bodleian Bruce 93 : le plus ancien témoin d'un projet historiographique sans cesse réactivé
Oriens Christianus
Les manuscrits éthiopiens d’Antoine d’Abbadie à la Bibliothèque Nationale de France. Collecte, copie et étude
Antoine d’Abbadie (1810–1897). De l’Abyssinie au Pays basque voyage d’une vie
bibl.publisher: Atlantica

bibl.title: Cinq cents ans de contrôle royal sur les produits agricoles tributaires d’Aksum
Etudes rurales

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: corrected the encoding based on Carsten Hoffmann´s and Dorothea Reule´s reviews.
modified the encoding to improve the visualised results
